hooks.command: powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms'); [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude Code needs your attention', 'Claude Code')"
curl.exe -s -d "Claude Code needs your attention" https://ntfy.sh/jimmy-smartai-cc-2026
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -I {} npx prettier --write {} 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '\.test\.' && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5 || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qiE 'rm\s+-rf|drop\s+table|gws\s+gmail\s+\+send' && echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous or send command detected. Ask for confirmation first.' && exit 2 || exit 0
echo '--- Recent changes ---' && git log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null && echo '--- Current branch ---' && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null
